title: Transfer Small Molecules Protocol
author: Opentrons
materials: P20 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will pick up tips.
Steps 1-5 will repeat for each column/destination plate.

steps.title: In this protocol, 1µL is transferred...
steps.instruction: In this protocol, 1µL is transferred from the small molecule library plate to the experiment plate seeded with cells. Explanation of complex parameters below: * **P20-Multi Mount**: Select which mount the P20-Multi Pipette is attached to. * **Number of Destination Plates**: Select the number of destination plates. * **Transfer volume (in µL)**: Specify the volume to be transferred. * **Mix with P300-Multi**: Select whether or not to add an optional mix step with the P300-Multi Pipette (200µL, 3 times) after the transfer occurs ---

steps.title: P20 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will mix library in corresponding column
steps.instruction: P20 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will mix library in corresponding column.

steps.title: P20 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will transfer...
steps.instruction: P20 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will transfer 1µL from the corresponding column of the Small Molecule Library Plate to the same column of the destination plate.

steps.title: P20 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will drop...
steps.instruction: P20 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will drop used tips in the waste bin.

steps.title: **Optional**
steps.instruction: **Optional**: P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will pick up tips, mix column, drop tip (repeat for each column), if **Mix with P300-Multi** is set to **Yes**.
